SAMURAI HOUSE · Nakasendo Trail · Nakatsugawa, Gifu

The forest
breathes here.

Walk the ancient Nakasendo through cedar forest, moss-covered stone, and mountain streams.
The old road is always waiting, quietly.

🍁秋 · Autumn
❄️冬 · Winter

Ancient cedar

Forest fungi
